title: AN ACT CONVERTING PANGASINAN PROVINCIAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LINGAYEN, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS PANGASINAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 17545 / 65 OG No. 46, 12712 (November 17, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5532*, November 17, 1969 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING PANGASINAN PROVINCIAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LINGAYEN, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS PANGASINAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.
